<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy; /** * CodeCleanerAware interface. * * This interface is used to pass the Shell's CodeCleaner into commands which * require access to name resolution via use statements and namespace context. */ interface CodeCleanerAware { /** * Set the CodeCleaner instance. */ public function setCodeCleaner(CodeCleaner $cleaner); }
